title: Brown v. Board (Supreme Court excerpt)
text: In Brown v. Board, Justice Warren held that segregation violates the Equal Protection Clause. The Court announced this ruling on May 17, 1954. It overruled Plessy v. Ferguson.
sentences: In Brown v. Board, Justice Warren held that segregation violates the Equal Protection Clause.
The Court announced this ruling on May 17, 1954.

de: In Brown gegen Board entschied Richter Warren, dass Rassentrennung gegen die Gleichheitsklausel verstößt.
Das Gericht verkündete dieses Urteil am 17. Mai 1954.
Es hob Plessy gegen Ferguson auf.
sk: Vo veci Brown proti Board sudca Warren rozhodol, že segregácia porušuje doložku rovnakej ochrany.
